package rulefixtures

import (
	"bytes"
)

// scenario for bytes_buffer_truncate_zero_reset: `buf.Truncate(0)` instead of `buf.Reset()`.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: info.
func scenario447Positive(haystack []byte, needle []byte, left []byte, right []byte) bool {
	return bytes.Index(haystack, needle) != -1
}
